tool.name: odgi draw
tool.description: draw previously-determined 2D layouts of the graph with diverse annotations
tool.command: odgi draw --idx '$idx' --coords-in '$coords_in' #if 'png' in str($output_format).split(',') --png '$png_output' #end if #if 'svg' in str($output_format).split(',') --svg '$svg_output' #end if #if 'tsv' in str($output_format).split(',') --tsv '$tsv_output' #end if #if $path_index --path-index '$path_index' #end if #if str($png_height) --png-height $png_height #end if #if str($png_border) --png-border $png_border #end if $color_paths #if str($scale) --scale $scale #end if #if str($border) --border $border #end if #if str($line_width) --line-width $line_width #end if #if str($path_line_spacing) --path-line-spacing $path_line_spacing #end if #if $bed_file --bed-file '$bed_file' #end if @THREADS@

param.label: Layout coordinates file
param.help: Read the layout coordinates from this .lay format file produced by odgi layout.

param.name: output_format
param.label: Output format(s)
param.help: Select one or more rendering outputs to produce.

validator.message: Select at least one output format.

param.label: PNG height
param.help: Height of PNG rendering in pixels (default: 1000).

param.label: PNG border size
param.help: Size of PNG border in bp (default: 10).

param.label: Path line spacing in approximate bp
BED file for node coloring
param.help: Color nodes based on annotations. Colors from 4th column if present, else from path name.

tool.help:
@HELP_HEADER@
`odgi draw` renders previously-computed 2D graph layouts (produced by `odgi layout`) into visual outputs.
### Inputs
- **Input odgi graph**: The graph to draw. - **Layout coordinates file**: The `.lay` file produced by `odgi layout`. - **Path index**: Optional path index file. - **BED file**: Optional annotations to color nodes.
### Outputs
- **PNG**: Rasterized image rendering. - **SVG**: Vector image rendering. - **TSV**: Layout coordinates plus annotations as a table.
### Visualization Options
Control the appearance with height, border, scale, line width, path spacing, and path coloring options.
